infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SummaLingua needs access to your camera to scan documents and extract text for summarization and translation. Images are processed securely and are never stored on our servers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SummaLingua needs access to your photo library to select images for text extraction. Selected images are processed securely and are never stored on our servers after processing.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SummaLingua needs access to your microphone to record audio for transcription, summarization, and translation. Audio recordings are stored only on your device and sent securely for processing. They are never stored on our servers.
